scoring_details.capability_fit: Injection Molding (0.5), ABS material (0.5), +0.1 for each additional relevant capability (max 0.5). Normalized by dividing by 1.5.
scoring_details.certifications: ISO 9001 (0.7), +0.15 for each additional relevant certification (max 0.3). Normalized by dividing by 1.0.
scoring_details.capacity: Meets 50,000 units/month (0.7), +0.1 to 0.3 for stronger explicit capacity indicators. Normalized by dividing by 1.0.
scoring_details.lead_time: 0 points if 'None' (all suppliers in this dataset).
scoring_details.evidence_quality: 0.25 points per unique evidence URL. Normalized by dividing by 1.0.

strengths: Comprehensive capabilities including Product Design, Tooling, Assembly, and Blow Molding.
Extensive certifications beyond ISO 9001, including IATF 16949, ISO 14001, and ISO 45001.
Very large reported capacity with over 300 machines and 40,000 tonnes annual processing capability.
Multiple manufacturing locations across India, offering geographic flexibility.
